description:
Legal query concerning payments between a husband and wife, the issuance of a bill of divorce, and exchanges of goods. Involves Damīra and someone whose brother is named Abū Naṣr. Dating: ca. 11th–13th century. Requires further examination.

Reused on verso for Hebrew dirges or at least poems related to mourning. These seem continuous with ENA 1324.14 and ENA 1324.22–29. Also potentially the same scribe/poet: ENA 2829.1–4; ENA 3020.10–11; and Stras. 4077.
description_he: שאלה משפטית ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
